internships.details: Currently seeking Software Engineering and Backend Development internship opportunities.

projectsExperience.title: AI Placement Portal
projectsExperience.description: Designed and developed a complete placement management system with recruiter and student dashboards, authentication, eligibility filtering, resume management, and analytics.

projectsExperience.title: Scalable URL Shortener
projectsExperience.description: Built a scalable URL shortening service with Redis caching, BullMQ background workers, analytics, MongoDB, and REST APIs.

projectsExperience.title: Real-Time Multiplayer Chess
projectsExperience.description: Developed a multiplayer chess platform with real-time communication, authentication, matchmaking, and persistent game sessions.

projectsExperience.title: Spam SMS Detection
projectsExperience.description: Built a machine learning model for spam SMS classification using NLP techniques and classical ML algorithms.

leadership.description: Active member of the technical society, participating in technical events, coding activities, and collaborative learning.
Participated in organizing and managing cultural and campus activities.
Contributed to event management, coordination, and creative initiatives.

hackathons.name: Smart India Hackathon
hackathons.description: Collaborated with teammates to develop an innovative software solution under time constraints while following an agile development approach.

teamExperience.description: Collaborated with teammates on hackathons, academic projects, and technical society activities using Git and GitHub for version control.

summary: Although currently a Computer Science undergraduate without professional internship experience, Shreyansh has built multiple full-stack and backend projects, actively participates in hackathons, contributes to technical communities, and has strong hands-on experience with scalable backend systems, competitive programming, and AI-powered applications.
